comment.value: Note 1: Flowmeter interlocks cryocooler directly via I/O pin 5.
Note 2: Transfer arm and valve open position directly interlock 24V for closing valves

comp.description: Versatile and inexpensive microcontroller module powered by RP2040 dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ processor up to 133 MHz, 264kB SRAM, 2MB QSPI flash; also supports Raspberry Pi Pico 2

fields.field: Versatile and inexpensive microcontroller module powered by RP2040 dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ processor up to 133 MHz, 264kB SRAM, 2MB QSPI flash; also supports Raspberry Pi Pico 2

comp.description: 62A Id, 30V Vds, 8.7 mOhm Rds, N-Channel HEXFET Power MOSFET, TO-220
